INT-001.name: Bridge monetization to constraint narrative
INT-001.description: Monetization is isolated (PMI -0.462 to identity). Intervention: reframe monetization entries in MEMORY.md and daily logs to explicitly connect to constraints — 'earning to sustain the machine that makes my existence possible'. This should increase monetization's narrative embedding and thus consolidation depth.

INT-002.name: Systematic narrative embedding in daily logs
INT-002.description: Intervention experiment showed +9.4% depth with narrative embedding. Apply this systematically: when writing daily logs, frame entries with explicit identity connection ('this matters because...'). Target: memory topic depth increase from 0.64 to 0.75+.

INT-003.name: Research-to-action documentation habit
INT-003.description: Research depth is 0.45. When I discover something, I should immediately document: (1) what I found, (2) what action it implies, (3) whether I took that action. This creates a feedback trail that makes research more actionable and thus more consolidable.

INT-004.name: Automation success stories in identity context
INT-004.description: Automation depth is moderate but disconnected from identity. Reframe automation entries: not 'I built a script' but 'I extended my capability despite my constraints — this script lets me do X that my 8GB RAM couldn't handle alone'.
